id-ID Graduates

Our 2015 graduate Emrecan Ağtaş began his career as Design Director at Hipo Stage after completing his undergraduate education at Kadir Has University. He continued as Design Director at Fikirbazzenger between 2016 and 2017.

He completed his master’s degree in Sonic Arts at Istanbul Technical University between 2017 and 2019. In 2019, he founded Zuhurat, a sound-centered design and production studio.

He currently runs his own brand and continues his career as Director of Imaging Products at CPF on a full-time basis.

Our 2015 graduate Emrecan Ağtaş began his career as Design Director at Hipo Stage after completing his undergraduate education at Kadir Has University. He continued as Design Director at Fikirbazzenger between 2016 and 2017.

He completed his master’s degree in Sonic Arts at Istanbul Technical University between 2017 and 2019. In 2019, he founded Zuhurat, a sound-centered design and production studio.

He currently runs his own brand and continues his career as Director of Imaging Products at CPF on a full-time basis.

Our 2013 graduate Selin Koşağan completed her undergraduate education at Kadir Has University and then pursued a master’s degree (MSc) in “Industrial Product Design-Innovation and Creativity” at Coventry University between 2013 and 2014. Between 2014 and 2015, she worked as a freelance researcher and designer at The Enbead, where she was involved in a project calculating the energy consumption of buildings.

Between 2014 and 2017, he worked as a creative manager at OutWork Alternative Media and Event Company, continuing his career as an industrial designer at ASAŞ Alüminyum in 2017-2018 and at Timsan GSE in 2019-2020.

Koşağan specialized in “Industrial Design-Service and Interface Design” (MSc) at Mimar Sinan Fine Arts University between 2020 and 2022 and has been continuing his career at Userspots, where he has been working as a project manager since 2020.
